reviews.review_text: This is the only game where Dallas, the Gman, and Leon Kennedy can detonate a thermonuclear weapon inside of a 7/11

I started playing Garry's Mod last year, and it became one of the best games I have ever played. It changed my life in a way I did not expect.

The reason I started playing it was because my dad banned me from playing Roblox because of my grades. At first, I was upset and did not know what to play. Then I downloaded Steam because I thought it might have some games that were as fun as Roblox. While looking through the store, I found Garry's Mod. I thought, "Wow, this game looks really cool!" I asked my mom if she could buy it for me, and thankfully she did.

When I first started playing, the game was a little difficult for me to understand. There were so many things to learn, and I did not know how to use all the tools. But after spending more time in the game, I started getting better and having a lot of fun. I learned how to build things, use mods, and explore different maps.

What makes Garry's Mod special is that there are almost no limits to what you can do. You can create your own adventures, build amazing things, and play with thousands of community-made addons. Every time I played, I found something new to try.

Garry's Mod changed my life because it helped me discover creativity and problem-solving. Instead of just playing a game, I was making my own fun and learning new things. Even though I started playing it because I could not play Roblox anymore, I am glad that happened because I found a game that I truly enjoy.

Overall, I would highly recommend Garry's Mod to anyone who likes creativity, freedom, and endless possibilities. It is one of the best games I have ever played, and I will never forget the memories I have made in it.  


10/10   One of the best creative game, I ever played!!

this is one of the most fun games i,ve played even know single player is a little boring i love multiplayer. and pill packs to play hide and seek with your friends. not only that there are so many mods in the game to maps nextbots ragdolls pillpacks skins cars and wepons basicly every thing. including a mod called g,water. it is the most realistic water ever in garys mod and you can even turn it into g,blood which makes well blood super realistick. thats all thank you gmod for existing.
Absolutely a must-play, you can do literally anything here, it's worth buying no matter what
finally created my two NPC's after 127 hours of opening and closing the game.. now i know how to code and blender kind of, so that's cool. i love this game!
just buy the game. its the definition of fun, and a necessity for any steam account.

👍 Recommended
🕒 6.9 hours on record  

Garry’s Mod is a legendary sandbox game that still holds up incredibly well thanks to its massive modding community and endless creativity. With 6.9 hours on record, I’ve only scratched the surface, but it’s clear why so many people keep coming back to it after all these years.

The game gives you total freedom. You can build crazy contraptions, roleplay, make movies, play custom game modes, or just spawn random stuff and cause absolute chaos. The physics are still some of the most entertaining around, and the sheer variety of mods and addons means you can turn the game into almost anything you want.

That said, the game is significantly more fun with friends. Messing around together, building dumb machines, playing horror maps, or just trolling each other creates some of the funniest moments you can have in multiplayer. Solo is good for building and experimenting, but the real magic happens when you play with others.

Even today, Garry’s Mod feels fresh because the community never stopped supporting it. Whether you want serious roleplay, nextbot chases, or just pure nonsense — there’s something for everyone.

If you enjoy creativity, chaos, and playing with friends, Garry’s Mod is an easy recommendation. A true classic that’s still going strong.  

Highly recommended with friends.🛠️😂🔨

Amazing & Fun game! I've wanted to purchase this game for almost 2 years but my Parents never really trusted buying stuff online haha.

My sister got herself a Bank account and she let me use her card to purchase this game, best Five Dollars I've ever spent, got hooked on the game for a while when I was free (outside of studying & school times), yes I may not have enough hours on the game since I'm pretty busy irl but honestly, It's really, really fun! (especially with friends!)

Recommended you buy this game, It's amazing! :D

So… Garry’s Mod was actually such a fun time when I played it about 10 years ago. Meeting random people on roleplaying servers or fooling around with friends was a blast. I remember once being stuck on an RP server for a few days, hanging out with strangers from across the globe. Just to never hear them again. 

Games like this, that make such random encounters possible; connecting with strangers, enjoying the weird and fun mechanics of the game together… that’s something that I feel like gaming in the 2010s made so special. 

I often long for such experiences in current times, where it feels like we as people, regardless of location and culture, are not expressing something like this in games or online anymore. If you can find a fun server or just want to experience goofy moments with your friends, give this game a shot. Who knows, maybe you’ll just be as nostalgic about it in 10 years as I am right now.
the graphics runned smoothly on my trash pc so thats a plus, i liked the multiplayer mode and other things

This is a great game, whether you are playing alone or with other people. Although the game by itself is very basic, Garry's Mod has a wide arrange of Workshop addons that you can add to the game. And there are plenty of online servers going on 24/7.

Truly a 9/10 experience. I've never had so many beautiful, wonderful connections on a game before, everyone I've played with on here has brought so much beauty and joy to my life. Wonderful, beautiful, absolutely stunning masterpiece of a game. Every single last person I've met on this game has been so kind, loving, and truly full of empathy. To the experiences I've had within the virtual cities of this game, to simply creating incomprehensible man made horrors. I've actually been brought REAL tears to my eyes playing this game with my friends and family. Throughout my entire talking stage of my previous relationship we played this game, truly wonderful times, I must say! I'm currently writing this on a whim, I simply cannot express in detail how much I ADORE and LOVE this EXQUISITE game. Truly magnificent, toast to you, Valve, for creating this wonderful game known as Garry's mod.
Yes. That's all you need to know. Yes. In all seriousness this game is fire to play alone or with friends, you can do almost anything.
